---
title: "Fact Archive"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="mongolia-shell archive-shell">
  <section class="archive-panel">
    <div class="archive-head">
      <div>
        <p class="archive-eyebrow">Mongolia 100</p>
        <h2>All 100 Mongolia facts</h2>
        <p class="archive-intro">
          Search the full archive by keyword, answer, or category. The numbering matches the fixed
          100-card deck used in the game.
        </p>
      </div>
      <div class="archive-actions">
        <label class="search-wrap" for="factSearch">
          <span>Search facts</span>
          <input id="factSearch" type="search" placeholder="Search by keyword, answer, or category" />
        </label>
        <a class="ghost-button archive-back" href="index.html">Back to game</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="facts-grid" id="factsGrid"></div>
  </section>
</div>

<script src="game.js"></script>
```
